value.title: LGES resolves its patent dispute with Sunwoda
value.summary: Chinese battery maker agrees to license LGES’ lithium-ion technologies.

value.title: Tulip Innovation and Sunwoda Enter Patent License Agreement
value.summary: Sunwoda Electronic (Sunwoda), a leading global provider of lithium-ion battery technologies and solutions, and Tulip Innovation (Tulip), the licensing agent for lithium-ion battery patents owned by LG Energy Solution and Panasonic Energy, have entered into a patent license agreement under Tulip's lithium-ion battery licensing program.

value.title: DTE Energy partners with LG to deploy 6 GWh of battery storage
value.summary: By 2042, DTE expects to have more than 2.9 GW of energy storage on its system, more than doubling its current storage capacity.
